use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and interfaces
Navigation and link buttons with accessibility support
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports keyboard navigation with focus-visible states, disabled states, and asChild pattern for polymorphic composition. Part of the FileTransferCard system from 21st.dev marketplace.
